title: Restore Collapsed Layer Rail Style and Fix Right Intelligence Panel Clipping

left_collapsed_rail_fix.old_issue: Collapsed left rail inherited the active Overview mode label, so parcel mode rendered as a short PARCEL rail/tag.
changes: Collapsed normal Overview rail now uses the neutral label Layers.
Collapsed rail is stretched to the full map workspace height with h-full and a minimum rail height.
Vertical label is centered in the rail and protected from wrapping/clipping.
Embedded/custom workspace rails can still use mode-specific labels where appropriate.
left_collapsed_rail_fix.visual_result: Browser smoke test measured a 58px-wide by 382px-tall collapsed rail aligned with the map/intelligence row, labeled Layers.

right_panel_clipping_fix.old_issue: Right Intelligence panel could appear clipped because the stable shell wrapper hid overflow and the panel root used a viewport max-height instead of the actual workspace row height.
changes: Stable Overview right wrapper now uses full-height flex sizing and overflow-visible so panel chrome is not clipped.
IntelligencePanel root now fills the available row height with h-full, max-h-full, w-full, overflow-x-hidden, and overflow-y-auto.
Panel content scrolls internally when the brief or action area is longer than the viewport.
Left panel wrapper now uses full-height flex sizing so the collapsed rail can stretch properly.
right_panel_clipping_fix.scroll_result: Browser scroll smoke confirmed Save Snapshot and Open Snapshots buttons become fully visible inside the right panel after scrolling.

overflow_scroll_behavior.horizontal_overflow: No document horizontal overflow detected in browser smoke checks.
overflow_scroll_behavior.right_panel: Overview Intelligence panel reported overflow-y: auto and remained inside the 720px viewport with panel bottom at 704px.
overflow_scroll_behavior.actions: Save Snapshot and Open Snapshots were reachable and fully visible after an in-panel scroll gesture.

default_layout_preservation.stable_overview: Default Overview remains the stable shell with command center, central SceneView, collapsed left rail, and right adaptive Intelligence panel.
default_layout_preservation.customization: Customize Layout button remains available, and browser smoke found no edit handles visible by default.
workflows_preserved: Countywide mode with expanded Map Controls
Model Lab mode with Model Lab controls and Intelligence panel

visual_qa_result.collapsed_rail: Long slim rail rendered as Layers; no PARCEL label in the collapsed rail.
visual_qa_result.right_panel: Panel scrolls internally and is not cut off at the viewport edge.
visual_qa_result.mode_checks: Explore Countywide opened layer controls; Model Lab opened Model Lab controls and Model Lab Intelligence.
visual_qa_result.navigation_checks: Planning Snapshot and Methodology loaded successfully.
visual_qa_result.console: No browser console errors observed during the smoke pass.

validation_results.python_compileall_app: exited 0; command reports no top-level app directory in this repo

safety_verification.notes: Changed only Overview shell/panel layout code and a regression test. Unsafe term search hits were existing guardrail/test assertions, not new user-facing exposure.

remaining_known_issues: Right panel content can exceed the viewport in dense states, but it now scrolls internally and keeps action buttons reachable.
The browser smoke test was run at the default 1280x720 in-app viewport; additional manual review at wider desktop widths is still useful for final visual polish.
